personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | Production Pipelines, Spark, Airflow & ML Data Platforms

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience and deep hands-on strength in Python, SQL, ETL/ELT, PySpark, cloud data platforms, production pipeline reliability, and telemetry-driven operations. Built and operated large-scale data pipelines across 6,000+ infrastructure endpoints, supporting forecasting, executive analytics, observability, data quality, and cost-aware processing. Strong fit for production-grade batch and distributed data workflows, ML training data enablement, data contracts, schema quality, automated testing, documentation, and monitoring; strongest cloud experience is AWS with transferable experience across cloud storage, compute, governance, and secure data access.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing manual processes with repeatable production data workflows used for capacity, risk, and executive reporting.
Built hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue, Redshift, and optimized Oracle schemas to process infrastructure telemetry and support scalable forecasting workloads.
Developed PySpark-enabled telemetry and forecasting workflows for large-scale data processing, including partitioning, historical retention, and performance tuning for analytics-ready datasets.
Migrated heavy ML forecasting workloads using Prophet and scikit-learn from on-prem Oracle processing toward Redshift-backed cloud execution, improving scalability for parallel forecasting scenarios.

Implemented operational reporting, data validation, dashboards, and alert-driven visibility across monitoring feeds including BMC TrueSight, CA Wily, and AppDynamics to support SLA-oriented production decisions.

Worked across engineering, operations, and leadership stakeholders to define data requirements, troubleshoot pipeline failures, document workflows, and improve reliability of data products used in regulated banking environments.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetics monitoring for Brand.com and other critical hospitality systems, supporting production reliability through telemetry, transaction tracing, and operational dashboards.
Led the FAST project, data-mining real-user and synthetic performance metrics to identify optimization opportunities adopted by engineering teams.
Upgraded Dynatrace from 6.5 to 7.0 and enforced TLS 1.2 security with no production monitoring regression during cutover.
Integrated HP Performance Center with Dynatrace to correlate load-test behavior with APM telemetry and support performance regression analysis.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a large enterprise environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents, supporting production monitoring, reliability, and telemetry governance.
Designed management modules, dashboards, alerts, and SLA thresholds that became reusable standards across client environments.
Built Perl/Ksh extraction scripts and automated reporting workflows that replaced manual weekly exports and improved operational visibility.
Collaborated with J2EE/WebLogic performance teams to investigate bottlenecks identified through APM telemetry and production monitoring data.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while preserving transaction integrity and sub-second query behavior.
Optimized transaction processing using C++, OCCI, OCI, and Oracle, reducing hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining high-volume data access requirements.
Built a C++/OCCI/OCI validation framework to verify migration correctness across millions of transaction records.
Automated schema conversion and data validation workflows to reduce migration risk during phased cutover.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed high-availability C/C++ and Pro*C billing interfaces using POSIX threads, sockets, Oracle, PL/SQL, and UNIX tooling for telecom-scale processing.
Improved billing process performance by reducing memory usage 75%, increasing throughput 20%, and achieving 10x database performance through sequence optimization.
Maintained and enhanced EDI interfaces, invoicing workflows, settlement logic, and reporting components across the billing lifecycle.
Operated across HPUX, SunOS, and Linux environments with disciplined version control, troubleshooting, documentation, and production support practices.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PL/SQL, Java, C++, C, Perl, Ksh / Korn Shell Scripting

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built an AI-driven capacity forecasting engine using Python, PySpark, Prophet, scikit-learn, and Streamlit to replace manual forecasting cycles and support predictive infrastructure decisions. The project maps strongly to ML data enablement, production telemetry processing, model-ready datasets, and stakeholder-facing operational analytics.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Bedrock, and PySpark patterns. Focused on raw telemetry landing, ETL processing, Parquet optimization, query-ready datasets, and GenAI Text-to-SQL enablement.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built a local agentic data and document pipeline using Python, FAISS, sentence-transformers, Grok API, and structured quality gates. Includes semantic duplicate detection, LLM-based scoring, JSON artifact generation, document rendering, and application tracking with repeatable orchestration.
